FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class MotionSprings

Namespace
FluentGpu.Animation
Assembly
FluentGpu.Animation.dll

The WinUI/Fluent-2 motion vocabulary as named presets, so controls share ONE set of spring/duration constants instead of inlining response/damping pairs. Durations: ControlFaster = 83ms (brush transitions, hover/press), ControlFast = 167ms (knob travel, settle animations), ControlNormal = 250ms (reposition, pane motion). The composition-spring presets match the WinUI indicator/selection-pill feel (slight overshoot, fast settle).

public static class MotionSprings

Properties

NavPill

The NavigationView selection-pill vertical slide (WinUI composition spring: snappy, faint overshoot).

public static SpringParams NavPill { get; }

Property Value

SpringParams

PartSettle

A snappy critically-damped settle for small template parts (knobs, chevrons).

public static SpringParams PartSettle { get; }

Property Value

SpringParams

SelectorPill

The SelectorBar underline/pill slide between items.

public static SpringParams SelectorPill { get; }

SpringParams
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
